entry.summary:

entry.title: Courting the Court Sorcerer
entry.summary:
Author: Harmon_A

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,462Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 47

Summary: It had been a year or so now, since the magic ban had been reversed, months since Merlin became Court Sorcerer. And a few more weeks since Merlin's injury.Arthur had finally given Merlin the Court-Sorcerer chambers he was promised, that just happened to be down the hall from the kings own .Arthur would insist this was not on purpose, but everyone had seen them around the castle, holding and kissing each others hands, teasing each other as usual but with the addition of grinning at each other.There had been a shift in their relationship, and it meant they were more protective of each other than usual. If it wasn't terrifying, it would probably be sweet.But of course this is Camelot, not everything can stay perfect for too long. Destiny would never allow it.---------------------------A continuation from the previous fic in this series. (read if you want context for Merlin's injury or their realtionship, but not needed) Merlin and Arthur begin courting, Merlin knows nothing about noble courting rules, Arthur will do anything to protect Merlin.

entry.title: Ezakıs and Humans
entry.summary:
Author: Merlin_In_The_Tavern

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,416Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 14

Summary: "You bring nothing but chaos," Merlin said, his voice echoing against the stone walls. "You will never reach that lake." Arthur closed the distance between them, a dangerous smirk playing on his lips. "Your kind only knows how to kneel, Merlin. Have you ever knelt for anyone?" Merlin didn't flinch. Instead, a wicked, knowing smile brushed his face. "No," he whispered, his breath teasing Arthur's skin. "But if you want to show me..." Beneath his skin, an ancient magic stirred impatiently. Arthur locked his gaze onto him. "Then by all means, try." In that moment, one thing became certain: Someone was going to kneel. — Long ago, humans and the Ezakis fought a war that nearly destroyed both races. At Lake Avalon, their kings finally swore peace before the sacred sword in stone, beginning the Age of Hazar. Years later, Uther Pendragon rose to power and shattered that peace. Desperate, humanity turned to Lake Avalon once more. The lake revealed Magic, and a colossal wall was raised between humans and the Ezakis. The spell could never break, the gate could never open, and humanity’s secret had to remain hidden. Yet another power was born that day—Merlin.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: The Price
entry.summary:
Author: dante0220

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 112,686Chapters: 73/?Kudos: 36

Summary: In the "Wicked Day", Merlin tries to save Uther's life. As Emrys, he tries to cast the healing spell. Unfortunately, Morgana's necklace contains an *extra* twist. As both healing spell and aging spell go wrong, Merlin is forced to flee. Kilgarrah takes him to safety. Mithian and Rodor grant him sanctuary. There Merlin realizes still more about his secondary royal destiny.

entry.title: You and me, we've got (browser) history
entry.summary:
Author: liviapeleia

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 31,820Chapters: 33/?Kudos: 220

Summary: A season 1 canon divergent AU told through Reddit posts. Gaius and Uther are having a secret love affair. Somehow, Geoffrey might be involved. Arthur has more throwaway accounts than brain cells, Morgana is an SJW (affectionate), Gwen is the only sane person, and Merlin is absolutely not in love, no way, never. And how the hell does Kilgharrah's cave have WiFi?

entry.title: A Thousands of Years in the Dark
entry.summary:
Author: cjorgo98

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 41,411Chapters: 11/13Kudos: 140

Summary: Merlin Emrys, 1500 years old, clinical medical examiner, professional hermit, has finally made peace with the fact that Arthur is gone.He has not made peace with this. He has simply gotten very good at pretending. When Detective Inspector Arthur Pennington walks into his morgue on a Tuesday, looking exactly the same and remembering absolutely nothing, Merlin's carefully constructed equilibrium lasts approximately forty seconds. There is also a murder. Possibly magic. Definitely a conspiracy. But mostly, this is about a man who has been in love for fifteen centuries trying to hold it together in a pub while Arthur Pendragon sits pressed against his leg and has no idea. Slow burn. Reincarnation. Heavy on the yearning, light on the sense.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: The Tiny Glow of Your Eyes
entry.summary:
Author: Itscanonifwewishenough

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,559Chapters: 6/15Kudos: 167

Summary: He shouldn’t have done it.Sleeping with his king — in the state Arthur was in that night.The worst part is, he doesn’t even remember all of it.— Just enough. The kiss. Arthur’s mouth, warm against his own. The breathless moans pulled from his throat. The way it felt like he was drunk — but even without the potion that caused all of this, Merlin knew one touch from Arthur would make him feel like he'd spent two whole weeks drinking in the tavern. And flashes of what came next.Enough to know that this time, he truly fucked up.So when he wakes, naked in his king’s bed, Merlin does the only thing he can — he grabs his clothes and runs.He barely makes it to Gaius’s chambers, disheveled and panicked, only to find the old man already holding the book Merlin now realizes — far too late — he mistranslated.And in that moment, it hits him. There is no undoing this. “Merlin,” Gaius says, voice low “pack your things. Go as far away as you can."“You’re carrying His Majesty’s child.” Or Arthur was being too much, and Merlin—a clumsy fool—mistranslated an ancient text and brewed a potion meant to calm His Majesty, only to end up pregnant with the king’s child instead.

entry.title: Reign of Bloody Time
entry.summary:
Author: BadAshWolf

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,423Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 10

Summary: For one hundred years, he carved lines into the earth and runes into his own skin. Now, it is time to crack both open and drag the future back to his King. But, as warned in the days of old, nothing will be brought back from the dead without a cost. He is a king-maker who has outlived his king, a warlock who has finally stopped bartering with words and started bartering with existence. He will pay any price if it means his heart never goes where he cannot follow him again.  A long time-travel, powerful Merlin, twisted Arthur, and what other dreams may come.

entry.title: 500 Miles From My Home
entry.summary:
Author: alesha_p3ndragon

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,912Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 142

Summary: Merlin counts the miles at first. Ten, because he is still able to turn back.Fifty because it finally feels like leaving. He tells himself he will stop. He’ll go back. He doesn’t.The words echo in his mind, the blue in Arthur’s eyes dimming, the flinch at the word traitor. A hundred miles from Camelot, that’s all he needs, right?

entry.title: like hephaestion,
entry.summary:
Author: ificouldwrite

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,378Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 126

Summary: Merlin slips into the chainmail, remembers how Arthur once helped him put on his gloves in Ealdor when they were trying to protect his village from being sieged. His magic tingles under his skin, recently recovered after the Crystal Caves. He wonders if wearing this armor, the king’s spare armor, if he could be disguised when using magic to stop the fighting before there are more casualties. Maybe he could even convince Morgana and Mordred that he’s Arthur, and distract them while Arthur leads Camelot to victory elsewhere on the battlefield.   A "Song of Achilles" x Merlin and Arthur fic.

entry.title: Unarmoured
entry.summary:
Author: HowDidIGetHere20

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 508,364Chapters: 98/100Kudos: 662

Summary: Arthur has always taken Merlin on every mission — unarmoured, untrained, endlessly reckless. It never used to matter. But lately, every danger feels sharper. Every close call lasts too long. And Merlin is starting to notice the way Arthur hovers… and how the prince’s worry is beginning to look a lot like something else. A slow-burn story about devotion disguised as duty, love revealed through quiet choices, and the people who become home when the world turns dangerous. Love wins — even when it has to fight for it. Written with a companion playlist (linked in the notes) :)

entry.summary:
Author: TkMara

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,360Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 11

Summary: Merlin has access to many random things about the future, one of which is the more "feminine" dialect that he loves to use. Of course, after listening to Merlin speak so much, Arthur ended up adopting this same dialect in his conversations.

entry.title: The Curse of One Love
entry.summary:
Author: luma882

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,889Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 6

Summary: Camelot is cursed. When Merlin enters the city, he does not yet realize that his fate is already bound to the name Pendragon. Arthur Pendragon's protection quickly turns to possession, his concern to a dangerous obsession. As an ancient dragon's curse begins to stir - and Uther Pendragon's madness stands as a warning - Merlin finds himself at the center of a love that can both save and destroy. For a Pendragon loves only once. And when that love is lost, all that remains is madness.

entry.title: The Eternity of Life
entry.summary:
Author: DragonTraining101

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 34,469Chapters: 17/?Kudos: 41

Summary: Merlin attempts to take his own life, but instead sets in motion a series of events the gods did not plan for. The gods are now scrambling to force a new prophecy. Faces from the past and present blur together as Merlin tries to save the world he wanted to leave.
